abstract.text: This scroll view lets you provide a scroll view header that
sticks to the top when the view scrolls.
This class can be used to manage the visibility of the main
status bar across a view hierarchy.
so it hides the status bar until the provided offset is
indicating that a view has been scrolled.
ScrollKit is a SwiftUI library that adds powerful scrolling features to SwiftUI, such as offset tracking and sticky scroll header views.
